full_text:
Cell count 1):

total: E6

live: E6

viability: %

size: um

Cell count 2):

total: E6

live: E6

viability: %

size: um

Total cell count: 3.836 e6 / mL

Total volume: 1 mL

A) RNA/DNA extraction (20 drops) + FFPE sample (4 drops) + Flow organoid (12 drops):

48-well plate

DNA/RNA + FFPE + flow: 36 wells x 40 µl x = 1440 µl → round up to 1500 uL (=750ul x2 or 375ul x4)

1500 cells/µl = 2.25E6

→ make 4 x 1.5 ml eppendorfs, 375 µl each

volume to take from cell suspension: 147 uL

ORG full medium → 47.1 uL

ome-gel → 171 µl

aprotinin → 1.2 µl

thrombin → 1.2 µl

fibrinogen → 7.5 µl

→ Let it solidify for 60 min - add 350 uL medium

B) Drug treatment for IF:

384-well plate

Leave outer wells empty = in total plate 308 wells 308 wells x 20 µl = 6160 µl

1000 cells/µl = 6.16E6 cells

→ make 2x of 3500 uL on a reservoir

volume to take from cell suspension: uL

ORG full medium → uL

ome-gel → 1592.5 µl

aprotinin → 10.5 µl

thrombin → 10.5 µl

fibrinogen → 70 µl

→ Let it solidify for 40-60 min - add 25 uL medium

→ Next day add drugs using Tecan drug dispenser

D) Sample for Flow - Day 0

→ Collect 0.5E6 cells per 900 uL flow staining buffer (divide into two: stained and unstained)

E) Sample for cryo

→ Collect 1.08 e6 cells per 1 mL stemcell banker (x1 vial)

plate (1): For DNA & RNA

Drops plated on non-cell culture treated 24 well plates (Greiner) to test whether we could avoid cells dropping on the bottom.

plate (2): For Flow & FFPE

Drug treatment conditions (B):

Treatment done on 384-well plate for 25 uL. See plate layout

Note!

Old batch (bacth 1) of omentum gel was used instead of Batch 2, since the Batch 2 stock we had in Helsinki was finished and Tuula Salo only brought rest of the Batch 2 to Helsinki later the week. Batch 3 is in process.

Next day:

Cultures

Treatment

Reagent | Stock concentration | Working concentration | Ratio
Omentum gel (BATCH 1) | 5.5 mg/mL | 2.5 mg/mL | 0.455
Aprotinin | 10 mg/mL | 33.3 ug/mL | 0.003
Thrombin | 100 U | 0.3 U | 0.003
Fibrinogen | 25 ug/mL | 0.5 ug/mL | 0.02

DNA | DNA | DNA | RNA | RNA | RNA
DNA | DNA | DNA | RNA | RNA | RNA
